title: ophrys beloniae
intro: Ophrys beloniae, also known as the Bee Orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Ophrys. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ophrys beloniae include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Traditionally, Ophrys beloniae has been prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
